replacement_kr.title: Increase first-30-day product adoption from 54% to 72%
replacement_kr.description: This focuses the KR on real usage behavior instead of a vague onboarding activity milestone.

change_summary: The replacement KR shifts from a task-style milestone to a measurable adoption outcome.
duplication_check: This KR measures early product adoption and does not duplicate time-to-value, satisfaction, or retention.
